name: CoStar Commercial Real Estate Data API
what_it_does: CoStar REST API for commercial real estate data and analytics platform. Enables AI agents to access commercial property listings and comps, retrieve lease transaction and rent data, handle building and portfolio analytics, access market vacancy and absorption data, retrieve tenant and occupancy information, manage property and space availability data, access comparable lease and sale transaction data, retrieve market trend and forecast analytics, handle geographic market analytics, and integrate CRE market intelligence with investment, leasing, and valuation platforms.
use_cases: Accessing commercial property listings and availability from CRE leasing automation agents
Retrieving lease comps and market rent data from commercial real estate agents
Analyzing market vacancy and absorption trends from CRE investment intelligence agents
Integrating CRE market data with property valuation from appraisal automation agents
not_for: Residential real estate without commercial property and lease data focus
Consumer property search without professional CRE research licensing
Non-CRE investment without commercial real estate market intelligence needs
best_when: A commercial real estate broker, investor, lender, or appraiser using CoStar wants AI agents to automate property research, lease comp analysis, market trend analytics, portfolio management, and investment due diligence.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: CRE market data informs large investment and lending decisions. Data redistribution requires licensed agreements — proprietary CoStar data cannot be freely shared. Automated valuation must supplement not replace certified appraisal. Market data licensing is expensive and restricted.

auth.notes: CoStar uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Organization-level credentials with property, lease, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Commercial data licensing agreement required. No webhooks — data is research-oriented, not event-driven.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — commercial real estate data licensing required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and data license enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Washington, DC. NASDAQ: CSGP. Founded 1987. Dominant commercial real estate information platform. $2.3B+ annual revenue. Owns CoStar, LoopNet, Apartments.com, Lands of America, and Homesnap. 6B+ sq ft of commercial property tracked. Used by 50,000+ CRE professionals globally. Competes with MSCI Real Assets (RCA) for CRE data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: CRE data informs large investment decisions — automated analysis requires human review
Data redistribution strictly prohibited — CoStar data cannot be shared publicly or with unlicensed parties
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key REST API with commercial data licensing
No webhooks — market data is research-oriented; polling for updates
Domain verification required — commercial licensing vets API users
Competitive and proprietary data — CRE professionals treat comp data as business confidential
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE market and lease data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Data redistribution restrictions. Proprietary market data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE market data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Proprietary data licensing restrictions.
